Odoo ERP Implementation Services

Appther delivers end-to-end Odoo ERP implementations for growing businesses across manufacturing, retail, and services. Our certified consultants handle everything from discovery to go-live and beyond.

Our Implementation Process

We follow a proven five-phase methodology: discovery workshops, solution design, configuration and customization, data migration, and user training. Each phase has clear deliverables and sign-off gates so stakeholders always know where the project stands.

Typical projects run between eight and sixteen weeks depending on the number of modules and the depth of customization required.

Why Choose Appther

Our team has delivered over fifty Odoo projects across the USA, Australia, Dubai, and Delhi NCR. We combine deep functional knowledge of finance, inventory, and manufacturing modules with hands-on technical expertise in Odoo's Python and ORM layers.

Case Studies

Read how we helped a mid-sized food distributor cut order-processing time by 30 percent after migrating from a legacy spreadsheet-based workflow to Odoo Inventory and Sales.
